name: Image Generation
description: AI-powered image generation with support for sketches, diagrams, and illustrations
author: Nimbalyst

marketplace.changelog:
1.0.2: Compatibility with the latest Nimbalyst runtime.
1.0.1: Light-theme readability and external file edit fixes.
marketplace.tagline: Generate images from text prompts with multiple style options
marketplace.longDescription: Create sketches, diagrams, illustrations, and other images by describing what you want. Manage multiple generations in a project file, compare variations, and iterate on prompts. Configurable style presets and generation settings.
highlights: Generate images from natural language prompts
Multiple style presets: sketch, diagram, illustration
Project files to organize and compare generations
AI tool integration for generating images during conversations

screenshots.alt: Image generation project with AI-generated sketches and style options
